prompt_outputs.saa: [Speaker 1]: Thank you for calling the non-emergency line. This is AI Assistant Athena. How can I help you? [Speaker 2]: Hi there. I'm hoping to speak with Officer Martinez. His badge number is 4521 about a traffic stop from last week. I have some questions about the citation he gave me and would really like to discuss it with him directly if possible. [Speaker 1]: What address was the incident report created for? [Speaker 2]: Oh sure, I can give you that. The traffic stop happened near the intersection of West Berry Street and Hemp Hill Street in Fort Worth. Do you need the exact address or is that intersection enough? [Speaker 1]: That intersection works. So the incident location is West Berry Street and Hemp Hill Street in Fort Worth. Can you please verify your phone number? [Speaker 2]: Absolutely. My phone number is 8175.5255124. Would you like me to confirm any other details? [Speaker 1]: Got it. That's 817552551234. Would you like me to confirm any other details? [Speaker 2]: Got it. That's 817552551234. [Speaker 1]: Jessica got it. And what is your last name? Please spell it out for me as well. [Speaker 2]: Sure. My last name is Ramirez, R-A-M-I-R-E-Z. [Speaker 1]: Jessica got it. And what is your report or incident number? [Speaker 2]: I don't have the report number with me right now, unfortunately. Is there another way you can look it up, maybe with my name or the date of the stop? [Speaker 1]: No problem. We go ahead and summarize what I have. The incident address is the intersection of West Berry Street and Hemp Hill Street in Fort Worth. Your phone number is 817552551234. Your name is Jessica Ramirez, and you don't have a report or incident number available at this time. Is that all correct? [Speaker 2]: Yes, that's all correct. Thank you for confirming everything. [Speaker 1]: I am transferring you to an agent. Please stay on the line. [Speaker 2]: The transfer is now complete. Stay on the line for the next available call taker.
